Scenario / Description: Authentication using valid Admin credentials
Pre-Condition: Admin account is registered and active
Steps: 1) Go to Login page; 2) Enter Admin username; 3) Enter password; 4) Click Login
Expected Output: System redirects to Admin dashboard with Admin permissions

Scenario / Description: Authentication using valid Staff credentials
Pre-Condition: Staff account is registered and active
Steps: 1) Go to Login page; 2) Enter Staff username; 3) Enter password; 4) Click Login
Expected Output: System redirects to Staff dashboard with Staff permissions

Scenario / Description: Authentication using wrong password
Steps: 1) Go to Login page; 2) Enter valid username; 3) Enter invalid password; 4) Click Login
Expected Output: System displays error for invalid credentials and denies access

Scenario / Description: Login with empty username and password
Steps: 1) Go to Login page; 2) Keep username/password empty; 3) Click Login
Expected Output: System shows required field validation and blocks login

Scenario / Description: Staff user attempts access to Admin-only screen
Steps: 1) Login as Staff; 2) Navigate to Admin URL; 3) Observe response
Expected Output: Access is denied or redirected to authorized page only

Scenario / Description: Admin creates new menu category
Steps: 1) Open Menu Management; 2) Click Add Category; 3) Enter details; 4) Save
Expected Output: New category is created and visible in category list

Scenario / Description: Admin creates new menu item with valid data
Pre-Condition: Admin logged in and category exists
Steps: 1) Open Menu Management; 2) Click Add Item; 3) Fill required fields; 4) Upload image; 5) Save
Expected Output: New item is added and appears in menu catalog

Scenario / Description: Admin updates existing menu item details
Steps: 1) Open existing item; 2) Edit fields; 3) Save
Expected Output: Item details are updated in menu catalog

Scenario / Description: Admin deletes menu item
Steps: 1) Select item; 2) Click Delete; 3) Confirm
Expected Output: Item is removed from menu catalog

Scenario / Description: Create menu item without required fields
Steps: 1) Open Add Item form; 2) Leave required fields empty; 3) Click Save
Expected Output: System shows validation errors and does not save item

Scenario / Description: Staff user tries to perform menu CRUD operation
Steps: 1) Login as Staff; 2) Open Menu Management; 3) Attempt Add/Edit/Delete
Expected Output: System denies CRUD permissions for Staff role

Scenario / Description: Staff creates order with valid table and items
Pre-Condition: Staff user logged in and items available
Steps: 1) Open POS/Orders; 2) Select table; 3) Add items; 4) Submit
Expected Output: Order is created with initial status Pending

Scenario / Description: Staff creates order with multiple items and quantities
Pre-Condition: Staff user logged in and items available
Steps: 1) Open POS/Orders; 2) Select table; 3) Add multiple items and quantities; 4) Submit
Test Data: table=T10; items=Karahi x1, Naan x4, Water x2
Expected Output: Order line items and quantities are saved correctly

Scenario / Description: Track order status through workflow
Steps: 1) Open order details; 2) Change to Preparing; 3) Change to Served
Expected Output: Status updates are saved and visible in real time

Scenario / Description: Generate digital bill for served order
Steps: 1) Open served order; 2) Click Generate Bill; 3) Review totals
Expected Output: Digital bill is generated with correct totals

Scenario / Description: Create order with unavailable menu item
Steps: 1) Open POS/Orders; 2) Select unavailable item; 3) Submit
Expected Output: System blocks submission or prompts unavailable item message

Scenario / Description: Create order with invalid table number
Steps: 1) Open POS/Orders; 2) Enter invalid table number; 3) Submit
Expected Output: System shows invalid table error and does not create order

Scenario / Description: Staff books table for available time slot
Pre-Condition: Staff logged in and slot is free
Steps: 1) Open Reservations; 2) Enter customer details; 3) Select date/time and party size; 4) Confirm
Expected Output: Reservation is confirmed and availability is updated

Scenario / Description: Duplicate booking for same table/time slot
Pre-Condition: Existing booking present for same slot
Steps: 1) Create first reservation; 2) Attempt second reservation on same table/time
Expected Output: System prevents double booking and shows conflict message

Scenario / Description: Booking with past date/time
Steps: 1) Open Reservations; 2) Select past date/time; 3) Submit
Expected Output: System rejects booking for past date/time

Scenario / Description: Update existing reservation details
Steps: 1) Open reservation; 2) Update time or party size; 3) Save
Expected Output: Reservation is updated and dashboard refreshes

Scenario / Description: Cancel reservation and release table slot
Steps: 1) Open reservation; 2) Click Cancel; 3) Confirm
Expected Output: Reservation is cancelled and table slot becomes available

Scenario / Description: Validate login response time under normal load
Steps: 1) Execute 30 login requests; 2) Record response times; 3) Measure average and p95
Expected Output: Average and p95 response times are <= 2 seconds

Scenario / Description: Validate order creation response time under concurrent load
Steps: 1) Simulate 50 concurrent order submissions; 2) Record response times; 3) Measure average and p95
Expected Output: Order creation responds within 2 seconds target

Scenario / Description: Verify monthly uptime target
Steps: 1) Collect uptime logs for 30 days; 2) Calculate uptime percentage
Expected Output: Monthly uptime is >= 99.9%

Scenario / Description: Enforce SSL by redirecting HTTP to HTTPS
Steps: 1) Open HTTP URL; 2) Observe redirect; 3) Validate secure connection
Expected Output: System redirects to HTTPS and uses valid SSL/TLS certificate

Scenario / Description: Block insecure communications and mixed content
Steps: 1) Attempt API call over HTTP; 2) Load page with insecure resource; 3) Observe behavior
Test Data: insecure API endpoint and HTTP asset URL
Expected Output: Insecure traffic/resources are blocked

Scenario / Description: Verify sensitive user data protection compliance
Pre-Condition: Test DB and policy access available
Steps: 1) Inspect credential storage; 2) Verify passwords are hashed; 3) Verify restricted access
Test Data: sample user records and access logs
Expected Output: Sensitive data is securely stored and role-protected

Scenario / Description: Verify unauthorized access to customer PII is denied
Steps: 1) Login as Staff; 2) Attempt to access Admin-level PII view; 3) Review auth result
Test Data: staff credentials and PII report URL
Expected Output: Access is denied and action is logged
